definition: area temperature measuring device with a two-dimensional array of individual detectors that samples radiation simultaneously across an area by electronic means

definition_ml.en: area temperature measuring device with a two-dimensional array of individual detectors that samples radiation simultaneously across an area by electronic means
definition_ml.de: Thermografiegerät mit zweidimensional angeordneten Einzeldetektoren, das die Strahlung einer Fläche gleichzeitig mit elektronischen Mitteln erfasst

note: As with single-element detectors, a distinction can be made, according to the operating principle, between (mostly) cooled photoelectric matrix detectors.

note_ml.en: As with single-element detectors, a distinction can be made, according to the operating principle, between (mostly) cooled photoelectric matrix detectors.
note_ml.de: Wie bei Einzelelement-Detektoren kann eine Unterscheidung bezüglich des Ausführungsprinzips zwischen den (meist) gekühlten photoelektrischen Matrixdetektoren getroffen werden.
